sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73025" key="o)ligoqermi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀλῐγο-θερμία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possession of little heat,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4034.tlg002:132:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mich.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in PN</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
